name: read_media
description: Read local media. Single files are parsed deeply; directories or multiple files return a compact contact-sheet thumbnail overview.

cli.description: Optional CLI-form command line. Example: media/downloads --max-files 10 --max-side 512

paths.description: Workspace-relative or absolute media paths to inspect.

path.description: Single workspace-relative or absolute media path to inspect.

include_text.description: For PDFs and text-like files, include extracted text. Defaults to true.

max_text_chars.description: Maximum extracted text characters per file. Defaults to 40000.

max_visuals.description: Maximum visual previews for single-file detailed mode. Defaults to 6.

max_side.description: Maximum preview image side in pixels. Defaults to 512.

max_files.description: When a path is a directory, read the newest N files by modification time. Defaults to 20.
